meaning: n.地磅,测荷仪,轮载测定仪
examples: Usually, with the above preparation, loadometer can be directly used.
Loadometer truck is mainly composed of goods bearing scale body, sensor, display instrument three main components.
Commonly we have two kinds of weighing instrument for truck carrier: loadometer, which is made in mechanical way, and electronic weighing machine, which USES sensor as force measuring instrument.
